units.title: Writing Studio V
units.en: 写作工坊 V（词库+守题）

阅读理解·掩耳盗铃.q: 下面哪些说法与故事相符？（多选）
阅读理解·掩耳盗铃.x: 他嫌钟太重才想敲碎、捂住耳朵后别人真的听不见了、钟声传遍了整条街
阅读理解·掩耳盗铃.r: 他嫌钟太重才想敲碎、钟声传遍了整条街、他最后被人们抓住了

Matter & Its States.q: Which of these are GASES? (select all)
Steam from a hot pot touching a cold window turns into water drops. This is —

Forces & Simple Machines.q: Which of these are simple machines? (select all)

Forces & Simple Machines.x: bike brakes stopping the wheel、machine parts wearing out、shoes gripping the floor
Forces & Simple Machines.r: bike brakes stopping the wheel、shoes gripping the floor

Forces & Simple Machines.q: Which are examples of a LEVER? (select all)
Which statements about FORCES are TRUE? (select all)
Forces & Simple Machines.x: Gravity pulls things toward Earth.、Smooth ice has more friction than sandpaper.、Friction can slow a sliding box.
Forces & Simple Machines.r: Gravity pulls things toward Earth.、Friction can slow a sliding box.、A pulley can change the direction of a pull.

Reading: Literary III.q: Which of these are INFERENCES (not stated directly)? (select all)
Reading: Literary III.x: Lena loved watching the birds.、Kai found a bottle.、The note was ten years old.
Reading: Literary III.r: Lena loved watching the birds.、Kai will probably visit the nest again.

Reading: Literary III.q: Which statements about the STORY are TRUE? (select all)
Reading: Literary III.x: Kai found the bottle near the rocks.、The old pine tree was still there.
Reading: Literary III.r: Kai found the bottle near the rocks.、The old pine tree was still there.、The chicks were noisy.

Reading: Literary III.q: What will Kai MOST LIKELY do next?
Reading: Literary III.r: keep watching over the new nest

Être / Avoir · Pronoms.x: je suis = I am、j'ai = I have
Être / Avoir · Pronoms.r: je suis = I am、j'ai = I have、nous sommes = we are
J'ai un livre.、Nous sommes contents.、Tu es mon ami.

Fractions IV.q: Which fractions are EQUAL to 2/3? (select all)

成语·新典故 III.x: 他恍然大悟，原来钥匙一直在口袋里。
成语·新典故 III.r: 他半途而废，坚持跑完了全程。

成语·新典故 III.q: 哪些成语可以形容「注意力集中」？（多选）
成语·新典故 III.r: 聚精会神、全神贯注、目不转睛

成语·新典故 III.q: 哪些搭配是正确的？（多选）
成语·新典故 III.x: 成绩名列前茅、说话川流不息、做事半途而废
成语·新典故 III.r: 成绩名列前茅、做事半途而废、房间收拾得井井有条

成语·新典故 III.q: 「都等不及了」——「迫不________待」。点选正确的字。

复句进阶 III + 识字 Day 23.q: 下面哪些关联词表示「递进」关系？（多选）
复句进阶 III + 识字 Day 23.x: 不但…而且…、尽管…还是…、不仅…还…

复句进阶 III + 识字 Day 23.q: 「我的________里有一张床和一张桌子。」点选两个字。

病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24.x: 他大约估计有五十人。、轮船慢慢驶出了港口。、这道题的难度水平很高又很难。
病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24.r: 他大约估计有五十人。、这道题的难度水平很高又很难。、我的家乡是广东人。

病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24.q: 「银行门口的自行车排成了一行。」两个「行」读——
下面哪些句子的标点使用正确？（多选）
病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24.x: 你去过大海吗。、轮船、帆船和渔船都停在港口。
病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24.r: 今天星期几？、轮船、帆船和渔船都停在港口。、他说：「我们出发吧。」

EN23#0.q:
✍️ Narrative (English only). Topic: a little boat. Write 4 sentences with this frame:
1) 'One day, a little boat named ____ sailed out to sea.'
2) 'Suddenly, ____.'
3) 'So the little boat ____.'
4) 'At last, ____.'
Word bank: wave, storm, wind, island, safe, brave, home.
Rule: every sentence must be about the little boat.
EN23#0.text: One day there a low boat nlar.Say to see sudda semon.And then semonster almost boat so the little boat.

EN23#1.q:
✍️ Descriptive (English only). Topic: your favourite food. Write 4 sentences:
1) What it LOOKS like.
2) What it SMELLS like.
3) What it TASTES like.
4) A simile: 'It is as ____ as ____.' or 'It is like ____.'
Word bank: sweet, warm, soft, crunchy, golden, delicious.
Rule: all 4 sentences must be about the SAME food.
EN23#1.text: 嗯One miis something that looks like blit smells like melted stuff it tastthe licies and sugabut doesn't have sugaAnd goin swacountry goden and delicious.

packet.ziChars: 读写听想说看她它我你他们哥妈弟妹姐爸书学班校老课时天月日年候后外前里下上石山田水土火树鸟虫花林草跳跑去飞走来小多短大长少肉吃喝鱼饭菜怕哭气笑好爱朋友同高兴远近海河江湖雨雪风节龙舟粽划赛香因为所以但虽然即使无论宁仅应该必须已经却竟居般确实越够始终由各直接受完教室象像等觉错题房间门窗床桌椅灯纸笔画字

mistakes.q: 下面哪些说法与故事相符？（多选）
mistakes.x: 他嫌钟太重才想敲碎、捂住耳朵后别人真的听不见了、钟声传遍了整条街
mistakes.r: 他嫌钟太重才想敲碎、钟声传遍了整条街、他最后被人们抓住了

mistakes.u: Order of Ops II · Equations II

mistakes.q: Which of these are GASES? (select all)
mistakes.x: air、ice、steam
mistakes.r: air、steam

mistakes.q: Which changes are REVERSIBLE? (select all)
mistakes.x: water evaporating、freezing water
mistakes.r: melting chocolate、freezing water、water evaporating

mistakes.q: Steam from a hot pot touching a cold window turns into water drops. This is —
mistakes.x: melting
mistakes.r: condensation

mistakes.q: Which of these are simple machines? (select all)
mistakes.x: a ramp、scissors
mistakes.r: a ramp、scissors、a wheelbarrow

mistakes.q: When is friction HELPFUL? (select all)
mistakes.x: bike brakes stopping the wheel、machine parts wearing out、shoes gripping the floor
mistakes.r: bike brakes stopping the wheel、shoes gripping the floor

mistakes.q: Which are examples of a LEVER? (select all)
mistakes.x: a seesaw、a jar lid、a crowbar
mistakes.r: a seesaw、a crowbar

mistakes.q: Which statements about FORCES are TRUE? (select all)
mistakes.x: Gravity pulls things toward Earth.、Smooth ice has more friction than sandpaper.、Friction can slow a sliding box.
mistakes.r: Gravity pulls things toward Earth.、Friction can slow a sliding box.、A pulley can change the direction of a pull.

mistakes.q: Which of these are INFERENCES (not stated directly)? (select all)
mistakes.x: Lena loved watching the birds.、Kai found a bottle.、The note was ten years old.
mistakes.r: Lena loved watching the birds.、Kai will probably visit the nest again.

mistakes.q: Which statements about the STORY are TRUE? (select all)
mistakes.x: Kai found the bottle near the rocks.、The old pine tree was still there.
mistakes.r: Kai found the bottle near the rocks.、The old pine tree was still there.、The chicks were noisy.

mistakes.q: What will Kai MOST LIKELY do next?
mistakes.x: cut down the pine tree
mistakes.r: keep watching over the new nest

mistakes.q: Which matches are CORRECT? (select all)
mistakes.x: je suis = I am、j'ai = I have
mistakes.r: je suis = I am、j'ai = I have、nous sommes = we are

mistakes.q: Which sentences are CORRECT? (select all)
mistakes.x: J'ai un livre.、Nous sommes contents.
mistakes.r: J'ai un livre.、Nous sommes contents.、Tu es mon ami.

mistakes.q: 3/4 − 1/8 = ? (simplest form)
What is 3/5 of 35?
2/7 × 3 = ? (fraction)
Which fractions are EQUAL to 2/3? (select all)
Round 6.278 to the nearest hundredth.
What is 30% of 90?
下面哪句成语用错了？
mistakes.x: 他恍然大悟，原来钥匙一直在口袋里。
mistakes.r: 他半途而废，坚持跑完了全程。

mistakes.q: 哪些成语可以形容「注意力集中」？（多选）
mistakes.x: 聚精会神、全神贯注
mistakes.r: 聚精会神、全神贯注、目不转睛

mistakes.q: 哪些搭配是正确的？（多选）
mistakes.x: 成绩名列前茅、说话川流不息、做事半途而废
mistakes.r: 成绩名列前茅、做事半途而废、房间收拾得井井有条

mistakes.q: 「都等不及了」——「迫不________待」。点选正确的字。
mistakes.x: 极
mistakes.r: 及

mistakes.u: 复句进阶 III + 识字 Day 23
mistakes.q: 下面哪些关联词表示「递进」关系？（多选）
mistakes.x: 不但…而且…、尽管…还是…、不仅…还…
mistakes.r: 不但…而且…、不仅…还…

mistakes.u: 复句进阶 III + 识字 Day 23
mistakes.q: 「我的________里有一张床和一张桌子。」点选两个字。
mistakes.x: 房
mistakes.r: 房间

mistakes.u: 病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24
mistakes.q: 选出所有的病句。（多选）
mistakes.x: 他大约估计有五十人。、轮船慢慢驶出了港口。、这道题的难度水平很高又很难。
mistakes.r: 他大约估计有五十人。、这道题的难度水平很高又很难。、我的家乡是广东人。

mistakes.u: 病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24
mistakes.q: 「银行门口的自行车排成了一行。」两个「行」读——
mistakes.x: háng、xíng… 不对，是 háng、háng
mistakes.r: háng、xíng

mistakes.u: 病句·近义词 II + 识字 Day 24
mistakes.q: 下面哪些句子的标点使用正确？（多选）
mistakes.x: 你去过大海吗。、轮船、帆船和渔船都停在港口。
mistakes.r: 今天星期几？、轮船、帆船和渔船都停在港口。、他说：「我们出发吧。」
